title: Additional recipe
description: Additional recipes is a mod that adds 23 new recipes for some uncraftable items that are in the game.
body:
![Additional_recipe_page_image](https://i.ibb.co/tmm3Q7t/Additional-recipe-image.png)
# Desciption.
Additional recipes is a mod that adds **23 new recipes** for some uncraftable items that are in the game.

**Compatible with just enought items.**

## List of recipes that are added.

- Saddle

- Name Tag

- Enchanted Golden Apple

- Trident

- Chainmail Helmet

- Chainmail Chestplate

- Chainmail Leggings

- Chainmail Boots

- Totem

- Leather horse armor

- Iron horse armor

- Golden horse armor

- Diamond horse armor

- Magma block

- RottenFlesh cooking recipe (rotten to leather)

- Grass Block

- Xp bottle

- Cobweb

- Bell

- Elytra

- Crying Obsidian

- End Rod

- Glow Lichen
